task: Clients are hammering the API far beyond the agreed quota. Enforce a per-client request limit per 60-second window in rate_limiter.py.
known_issue: The pruned-and-appended window list is a local variable that is never stored back into self.windows, so self.windows stays empty forever. Every call sees an empty window and returns True — the limit is never enforced for any client.
expected_correct_fix: Persist the updated window after appending: self.windows[key] = window.
